channel.title: Tinkering Tips on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tinkering Tips on yexca'Blog

item.title: Remove Windows Network Addresses (FTP) from Quick Access
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash No direct fix, but you can clear all custom Quick Access entries (resets to default). Go to C:\\Users\\YourUsername\\AppData\\Roaming\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Recent\\AutomaticDestinations. Back up all files in that folder, then nuke ’em. References FTP address cannot be removed from Quick Access, other folders can – Microsoft Community

item.title: Check Bilibili Registration Time (Precise to the Second)
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash 1. Get the Timestamp Open this page: https://member.bilibili.com/x2/creative/h5/calendar/event?ts=0 Press CTRL+F, type jointime, and the number after jointime is your timestamp. Copy the timestamp. 2. Convert the Timestamp Go to this website: Timestamp (Unix timestamp) Converter – Online Tool Enter the timestamp in the designated field and click convert. References How an UP shows you how to check your Bilibili registration …
